description: Spectator style shoes from catwalk  - a modern reinvention of the achingly stylish two-tone footwear style! Superior in quality and high on style, this pair does not disappoint. The leather upper makes it perfect for everyday wear.UpperLeather upper with reinforced synthetic leather overlays at the heel cup and toe boxCut-out patterning no the synthetic leather overlayCut-out patterning on the leather upperPadded insole for instep comfortOutsoleTPR outsole attached to the footbedMild grooves on the midfoot areaUpraised heel with mild terraced groovesshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
